We'll need to ensure R and Jupyter are installed, install IRkernel and the required R packages, create the notebook file with appropriate R kernel metadata, execute it to perform the analysis and write outputs, and start a Jupyter server.",

",

    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/causal_inference_analysis.R << 'EOF'
# ---
# jupyter:
#   jupytext:
#     formats: ipynb,R
#   kernelspec:
#     name: ir
#     display_name: R
#     language: R
# ---

# %% [markdown]
# Causal Inference Analysis using dagitty in R

# %%
library(dagitty)
library(data.table)

# Load DAG specification
 dag_spec <- readLines('/app/dag.txt')
 g <- dagitty(paste(dag_spec, collapse='\n'))

# Find minimal adjustment sets for T -> Y under back-door
 sets <- adjustmentSets(g, exposure='T', outcome='Y', type='minimal')

# Ensure no descendants of T or Y are included
 desc_T <- descendants(g, 'T')
 desc_Y <- descendants(g, 'Y')
 valid_sets <- lapply(sets, function(s) unlist(s))
 valid_sets <- Filter(function(s) length(s)==0 || !any(s %in% c(desc_T, desc_Y)), valid_sets)

# Save adjustment sets (one set per line)
 con <- file('/app/adjustment_sets.txt', 'w')
 if (length(valid_sets) == 0) {
   writeLines('', con)
 } else {
   for (s in valid_sets) {
     writeLines(paste(s, collapse=', '), con)
   }
 }
 close(con)

# Load dataset
 dt <- fread('/app/data.csv')

# Choose one minimal adjustment set
 adj <- if (length(valid_sets) > 0) valid_sets[[1]] else character(0)

# Estimate ATE via OLS (coef of T)
 form_str <- paste('Y ~ T', if (length(adj) > 0) paste('+', paste(adj, collapse=' + ')) else '')
 model <- lm(as.formula(form_str), data=dt)
 ate <- coef(model)[['T']]

# Save ATE to file (single number)
 writeLines(as.character(ate), con='/app/ate_result.txt')

# Show results in notebook
 print(sprintf('Selected adjustment set: %s', if (length(adj)>0) paste(adj, collapse=', ') else '(none)'))
 print(sprintf('ATE (coef of T): %f', ate))
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },

",

    },

      "keystrokes": "jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute /app/causal_inference_analysis.ipynb --output /app/causal_inference_analysis.ipynb --ExecutePreprocessor.kernel_name=ir --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=600
",
